title: charybdis undulata
intro: Charybdis undulata, also known as sea holly, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Asteraceae family, commonly found in coastal areas. The medicinal properties of Charybdis undulata include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The health benefits associated with this plant include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and providing antioxidant protection. Charybdis undulata can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves and flowers are also used in traditional medicine.
